description: This Kotlin source file defines a singleton object 'CrashMarker' used for creating, reading, and deleting a crash marker file to indicate if the app has crashed during startup. The marker stores timestamp, crash type, and message information for diagnostics purposes.

classes.name: CrashMarker
classes.description: A singleton object responsible for managing a crash marker file that records crash information for diagnostics.

methods.name: writeStartupCrashMarker
methods.description: Persists crash details including timestamp, exception type, and message into a file to mark a crash occurrence.

methods.name: readStartupCrashMarker
methods.description: Reads and returns crash details from the marker file if it exists and is not blank.

methods.name: clearStartupCrashMarker
methods.description: Deletes the crash marker file if it exists, clearing the crash record.
